title: K-200 Comms/Datalink Qualification Test Report
text:
# K-200 Comms/Datalink Qualification Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-418-B. Revision: B. Type: test-report. Author: Sam Dreher. Created: 2024-08-22. Last modified: 2024-12-15. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Comms/Datalink subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1074, P-1036, P-1048, P-1081.
